{{Quote|I have heard that Tammar has an unusually thin atmosphere for an inhabited world.|[[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]], to [[Ayddar Nylykerka]]|<ref name="BtS">''[[Before the Storm]]''</ref>}}
'''Tammar''', originally known as '''Lelrais''',<ref name="TEA" /> was the [[Tammarian]] homeworld. This [[Planet/Legends|planet]] had an unusually thin [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]], which caused native Tammarians to evolve a chemical pouch called a [[chaghizs torm]] to store [[Oxygen/Legends|oxygen]]. This allowed them to survive in the vacuum of space for short periods. Tammar also had no standing [[Water/Legends|water]].

Circa [[25,130 BBY]], Lelrais was absorbed into [[Xim's empire|Xim's Empire]] as [[Xim/Legends|he]] expanded his borders from the [[Kingdom of Cron]].

[[Ayddar Nylykerka]], chief researcher of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] Asset Tracking Office, was a native of Tammar.
